mapper.sql: select id, bill_no, status, so_id, so_item_id, product_id, product_code, product_name, product_spec, draw_no, customer_product_no, unit_id, need_day, promise_day, order_day, priority, quantity_planned, quantity_released, price, discount_price, amount, discount_rate, final_amount, customer_id, project_id, sales_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from del_plan_item
mapper.insert:
insert into del_plan_item
bill_no, status, so_id, so_item_id, product_id, product_code, product_name, product_spec, draw_no, customer_product_no, unit_id, need_day, promise_day, order_day, priority, quantity_planned, quantity_released, price, discount_price, amount, discount_rate, final_amount, customer_id, project_id, sales_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{billNo}, #{status}, #{soId}, #{soItemId}, #{productId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productSpec}, #{drawNo}, #{customerProductNo}, #{unitId}, #{needDay}, #{promiseDay}, #{orderDay}, #{priority}, #{quantityPlanned}, #{quantityReleased}, #{price}, #{discountPrice}, #{amount}, #{discountRate}, #{finalAmount}, #{customerId}, #{projectId}, #{salesId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from del_plan_item where id in
#{id}
